title: RØDE NTH-50 Professional On-ear Wired DJ Headphones | Durable, Comfortable, Hi-Fi Audio | Musicians, Filmmakers, Creators (Black)
features: Custom 40mm driver with revolutionary resonant chamber and acoustic design
Incredibly accurate frequency response and ultra-low distortion
High-grade aluminium housing and compact, lightweight design
Contoured headband and integrated open-design housing to minimise wearing fatigue

NTH-50 Merchant video Driven By Sound The NTH-50 on-ear professional headphones combine extraordinary sonic performance with a sleek, rugged and comfortable design. Custom-built dynamic drivers, paired with an innovative resonant chamber design, deliver exceptionally clear audio with enhanced passive noise isolation. Previous page Balanced Sound A custom-built 40mm dynamic driver delivers beautifully rounded bass and rich high-end clarity. Precision Made Precision-tuned for ultimate accuracy, the NTH-50 enhances every sonic detail. Premium Design Constructed with a rugged yet lightweight aluminium build to endure on your creative journey. Ultimate Comfort A contoured headband provides unmatched comfort, keeping you creating longer. Next page 1 Custom Driver 2 Precision Tuning 3 Built To Last 4 Contoured Headband Made For Professionals The NTH-50s have been meticulously crafted for DJs, sound engineers, and content creators who spend long hours in the studio and appreciate exceptional sound. Everything You Need The NTH-50 headphones come with a headphone cable, 3.5mm to ¼-inch adaptor, a COLOURS ID set and a storage pouch. What are On-Ear Headphones? On-ear headphones are a type of headphone that sits directly on the ears rather than enclosing them completely. What is the frequency response of the NTH-50 headphones? The NTH-50 headphones offer an incredibly accurate frequency response, suitable for critical listening and content creation. For detailed specifications, please refer to RØDE's official documentation. Are the NTH-50s comfortable? Very. Memory foam ear cushions conform to your ears for a comfortable fit while a fontanel recess in the headband reduces pressure on the top of the head. Can the cable be removed? Yes, the NTH-50 features dual cable attachments, so the cable can be plugged into either the left or right earcup to suit your recording setup.
